case_title: MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. VS. ROBERTO ARRAS ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARRAS, ROBERTO $1,179.55 PRINCIPAL, $258.95 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,438.50, SEE SCANNED DOC
